name: PrivSend — one-time encrypted secrets
description: Send end-to-end-encrypted, one-time secrets and files. The encryption runs on your device from this installed, audited copy — the server only ever sees ciphertext.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; connect-src https://privsend.app; img-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'
